title: هواياتي المفضلة
description: تحدث عن الأشياء التي تحب القيام بها في وقت فراغك.

scenes.name: Narrator
scenes.en: Mona and Ahmed are in the park. They are talking about hobbies.
scenes.ar: منى وأحمد في الحديقة. يتحدثان عن الهوايات.

scenes.name: Mona
scenes.en: Ahmed, what do you like to do?

scenes.name: Ahmed
scenes.en: I like to play football! It is fun!
scenes.ar: أحب أن ألعب كرة القدم! إنها ممتعة!

scenes.name: Mona
scenes.en: Football is great! I like to read books.
scenes.ar: كرة القدم رائعة! أنا أحب قراءة الكتب.

scenes.name: Ahmed
scenes.en: Reading is good! What books do you like?

scenes.name: Mona
scenes.en: I like adventure books! They are exciting!

scenes.name: Ahmed
scenes.en: I also like to draw. I draw animals.

scenes.name: Mona
scenes.en: That is nice! I like to listen to music.

scenes.name: Ahmed
scenes.en: Music is wonderful! We have many hobbies!

questions.q: What does Ahmed like to do?
I like to ___ books.|||أحب قراءة الكتب.

finalQuestions.q: What does Mona like to do?
What do you like to ___?|||ماذا تحب أن تفعل؟
